name: Scroll-Cage Checkbox
description: Align three portal pairs across four independent scroll surfaces, then use the cursor's physical repulsion field to herd one checkbox through the cage and into its final clamp.

metadata.notes: Full replacement of the rejected tutorial pilot. Four independently scrolling physical surfaces carry paired portal apertures; a fixed-step body collides against closed dividers from either direction and responds only to the visible cursor-repulsion field. Checking is physically disabled until clamp capture, and the independent grader replays every offset, cursor sample, tick, collision, crossing, capture, and check.
